\section{Results}
\label{sec:results}

% Auto-generated tables from: make latex-tables
% Requires \usepackage{booktabs} in main.tex
\input{tables/all_experiments_summary.tex}

\subsection{Key findings}

On synthetic 2D tasks, parameter-matched classical MLPs remain competitive with
variational quantum circuits (exp\_001, exp\_008).
Entanglement topology shows no Holm-significant benefit on circles (exp\_003, exp\_009).
Curriculum staging and self-play provide no significant holdout gain (exp\_005, exp\_007).

Real-data experiments (exp\_011--exp\_014) require first publication runs;
see individual \texttt{results.md} files after execution.

\subsection{Figures}

Publication figures are generated via \texttt{make figures} from
\texttt{logs/experiments.jsonl}:
\begin{itemize}
  \item Per-experiment leaderboard bar charts with bootstrap CIs.
  \item Cross-experiment best-model summary.
  \item Learning curves from training history.
\end{itemize}

Copy PDFs from \texttt{figures/} into \texttt{paper/figures/} for inclusion, e.g.:

\begin{verbatim}
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth]{figures/exp_001_leaderboard.pdf}
\end{verbatim}
